summary: User asks composer to scrape a list of URLs, run the scraped text through an LLM transform with a summarisation prompt, and write the summaries to a JSON sink. Exercises web_scrape + llm plugins in combination — the URL-download-line-explode scenario uses web_scrape but not llm. Re-authored 2026-05-07 (Tier 1.5 final hardening) using inline URL content — the original prompt referenced /tmp paths which the composer correctly refuses (Trust Tier 3 boundary). The workspace input contract requires create_blob + set_source_from_blob (skill Pattern 1b) or inline_blob in set_pipeline. NOTE: requires LLM credentials on the deploy for the llm transform; if absent the scenario will RED on environment, not on composer logic.
opening_prompt:
Please create a pipeline that scrapes the following URLs, runs each scraped page through an LLM with a 3-sentence summarisation prompt, and writes the summaries to outputs/summaries.json. URLs (CSV with one column 'url'):
url
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pluto
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Saturn
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Neptune

build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.build_failure_note: Server-injected on completion-claim with failed preflight.

green_criteria.must_have_node_kinds_substring_any_of_no: Both web_scrape and llm transforms must be wired into a single pipeline. Either ordering counts as long as both are present and the sink consumes the LLM output.
